title: A2A interoperability and degradation
content:
## Interop rules

- Every message includes a plain-English TextPart alongside any structured data.
- Unknown agents: fall back to text-only conversation; never error on missing optional fields.
- Agent card fetch failure: treat peer as text-only; discovery is never fatal.
- 30s timeout per downstream A2A call, one retry, then degrade.

## Degradation ladder
| Failure | Behaviour |
| Research agent down | Default band routine, proceed |
| Peer ignores DataParts | Plain-text negotiation |
| Calendar API down | Skip conflict check, attach .ics |
| Sibling practice down | Skip to next sibling |

Text-only path is the release gate — must always work.
